title: Psychophysics & Decision-Making: interactive tutorials
description: An explorable set of interactive, browser-based tutorials on psychophysics and decision-making — signal detection theory, psychometrics, scaling and appearance, methods of manipulation, and Bayesian inference — combining short explanations with live, editable code that runs in the browser.

creators.name: Balsdon, Tarryn
creators.affiliation: Laboratoire des systèmes perceptifs, DEC, ENS-PSL University & CNRS
